response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no demonstrated experience with C programming in UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all of which are non-negotiable for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective, CI/CD infrastructure)
Active contributor to open source and technical education through workshops
concerns: No C programming experience in embedded or UNIX environments
No evidence of Linux kernel analysis, modification, or embedded security work
No Japanese language proficiency; spoken/written English is the only language listed
